nodes.name: generate_series_with_now.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for generate_series() combined with now() temporal functions, testing time-bounded series generation plan creation.

nodes.name: generated_columns.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for generated (computed) column definitions and queries, verifying plan generation for virtual computed columns.

nodes.name: grouping_sets.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for GROUPING SETS, CUBE, and ROLLUP aggregation queries, testing multi-dimensional aggregation plan generation.

nodes.name: index_selection.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for index selection optimization, covering a wide variety of query patterns to validate the optimizer's index choice.

nodes.name: index_selection_for_backfilling.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for index selection during materialized view backfill operations, verifying correct index usage in backfill plans.

nodes.name: insert.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for INSERT statements including INSERT INTO ... SELECT and INSERT with DEFAULT values, testing DML plan generation.

nodes.name: intersect.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for INTERSECT (set intersection) queries, testing plan generation for intersection operators.

nodes.name: join.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for join queries (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER, CROSS), testing join plan generation and optimization strategies.

nodes.name: join_ordering.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for join ordering optimization, verifying that the optimizer reorders joins based on cost estimates.

nodes.name: jsonb_in_stream_key.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for using JSONB columns as streaming distribution keys, validating plan handling of JSONB key types.

nodes.name: lateral_subquery.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for LATERAL subqueries, testing correlated subquery unnesting and lateral join plan generation.

nodes.name: limit.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for LIMIT and OFFSET queries, verifying TopN operator plan generation and limit pushdown.

nodes.name: locality_backfill.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for locality-aware backfill plans, testing co-located backfill operator placement optimization.

nodes.name: logical_scan_predicate_eliminate.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for predicate elimination on logical scans, testing redundant filter removal optimization.

nodes.name: match_recognize.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for MATCH_RECOGNIZE pattern matching queries, testing complex event processing (CEP) plan generation.

nodes.name: mv_column_name.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for materialized view column naming, validating that output column names are correctly derived and preserved in MV plans.

nodes.name: mv_on_mv.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for chained materialized views (MV on top of MV), testing plan generation for nested MV queries.

nodes.name: mv_selection.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for materialized view selection queries, covering batch and streaming plan generation for MV-backed tables.

nodes.name: named_window.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for named window specifications (WINDOW clause), testing plan generation for reusable window definitions.

nodes.name: nested_loop_temporal_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for nested loop temporal join plans, testing temporal table join plan generation using nested loop strategy.
